'''Seenlu Kir''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
Discovered to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] at a young age, Seenlu Kir was taken to the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] for [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Studying for years as an [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]] in the [[Jedi academy|Temple's academy]], Kir eventually [[Initiate Trials/Legends|graduated]] and was taken as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] by a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. After years of traveling together, Kir passed her [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]] and was made a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]]. Continuing her studies independently, Kir followed the path of the [[Jedi Consular]] in order to help bring peace to worlds throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="LFC" />

On an assignment for the High Council, Kir's hands were scarred when she failed her mission. Donning gloves to hide her hands, Kir began to wear pants and vests as opposed to the traditional [[Jedi apparel/Legends|robes]] of the Order. Soon after this failure, Jedi Kir traveled to the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]] and began working out of the [[Almas Academy|academy]] on [[Almas]]. Taking on a teaching position, Kir trained students at all levels before being assigned to oversee the dormitories of the youngest Initiates.<ref name="LFC" />

==Personality and traits==
A passionate woman, Jedi Seenlu Kir longed to bring peace to the galaxy through her work with the Jedi Order. Shamed by failing a mission, her reassignment to the Almas Academy helped her forget her shame through working with young students. In addition, Kir's secret desires for a family of her own were set aside after being appointed as overseer of the dormitories.<ref name="LFC" />
